ar.err.invalid_ip_address: Error: ip_address must be a valid IPv4 address.
ar.tool.description: Discover ECHONET Lite objects on a node and return a JSON or text list.
ar.param.timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for ECHONET Lite requests.
ar.msg.summary: ECHONET Lite object list fetched: {count} object(s) in {elapsed_ms} ms.
